programme.desc: How to make a bicycle which can fold up to a tenth the size of a regular bike. Plus, the process behind the making of a Borsalino hat worn by Indiana Jones

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How to make the Fender Stratocaster electric guitar, and a look at the way Swedish fermented cod roe Kalles caviar is made

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike Brewer finds a clean Subaru Impreza WRX at a good price, and hands it to Edd China to make it stand out by giving it a performance boost and changing its appearance

programme.title: Combat Dealers
programme.desc: Bruce Crompton hopes to make a handsome profit by selling some of the long-forgotten treasures that lie around his cluttered warehouse

programme.title: American Chopper
programme.desc: Orange County Choppers plays host to the RJR memorial car show, and Paul Teutul Jr enlists the aid of the fire department to organise a pancake breakfast

programme.title: Supertruckers
programme.desc: Sergeant Major and Sully move two large boiler houses from the West Midlands to Bristol. However, the pressure is felt as they reverse their ultra-delicate cargo through a tiny yard

programme.title: Mega Shippers
programme.desc: In Oxford, 280 Minis must be loaded onto a train in just six hours. Bound for Southampton, they need to be loaded on ferries for export to China, Japan and the USA

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: Revealing how Macarons, Pine Needle Baskets and Micrometers are made, and how the processes have been prefected over time

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: The manufacture of endoscopes and megaphones, and the refinement of uranium

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The Wheatsheaf in Sandbach, Cheshire, where owner Jake Pare and general manager Chris Baldwin hope to impress their guests

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: B&B owners in France juggle a busy diary with the pressures of parenthood. In Spain, a microbrewery ramps up promotion, and a couple in France create face cream from snail slime

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: In southern Spain, Jonnie Irwin goes house-hunting in and around the hill-top town of Competa, Andalucia, with Michael and Seamus from Northern Ireland. The duo love cooking and entertaining and are searching for a holiday home where they can invite all their friends. However, while Seamus likes a modern style, Michael has much more traditional tastes, so with a budget of £175,000 and five options up his sleeve, Jonnie tries to come up with the perfect property to suit them both

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Su and Reg Roberts from south Wales first fell in love with Tobago 20 years ago and have been back every other year since. Now, with their children growing up and retirement approaching, they're ready to turn their dream of a holiday home on the island into a reality. Presenter Scarlette Douglas shows them five properties within their £310,000 budget

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the first dinner date in Middlesbrough glamorous 41-year-old sales assistant Gail hosts a night full of sparkly gourmet grub and teaches her guests a lesson or two in beauty. Her guests are 52-year-old vintage shop owner Jane, 28-year-old football coach Dan, 57-year-old art enthusiast Julie and 47-year-old pub landlord Gary. Gail gets the glitter, sparklers and hair extensions out, but whether her food will get glowing reviews ramins to be seen

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Goalkeeping coach Dan hopes to thrill his guests with a James Bond evening in Middlesbrough, including 007-inspired food and a Bond villain. however, Julie and Jane fail to 'bond' on the night, falling out over everything from who's been the best James Bond, to how to pronounce Roger Moore. Gary and Gail also fall out when the table chat turns to 'lookey-likeys'. After dinner, Dan challenges his guests to put one past him in a penalty shoot-out, which ends with a surprising result

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Middlesbrough, pub landlord Gary plans a 1980s evening, serving classic dishes with a modern twist. However, Jane and Julie are still bickering and Gary falls out with Gail over his dessert. Showman Gary flambés his steaks at the table, and tops things off with a magic display that goes down well with all of his guests - except one

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Vintage shop owner Jane serves up a retro menu and a vintage clothes competition in Middlesbrough. Jane's been on the attack at the table so far, but she's planning to be the perfect host this time. On a lively night, there's more drama between the diners, and Julie and Gail discover that Jane has created headlines in the local news

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the last night in Middlesbrough, Julie's Indian menu gets mixed reviews, while Gail and Jane make a shoe discovery that leads to some shocking dinner table revelations. Gary finds out how much he's got on Jane's nerves throughout the week, as the contestants candidly reveal what they think of each other

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: An episode consisting of three Valentine's Day stories. Frasier takes his station manager to dinner, but cannot work out whether she has a personal or professional interest in him. Niles' plans for a romantic evening are dashed, while Martin and Daphne commiserate with each other in their loneliness. Guest starring Virginia Madsen (Sideways)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles hires a new lawyer to represent him in his divorce case when Maris tries to postpone the settlement. However, the attorney warns him that his unrequited passion for Daphne could harm his chances in court - and so could Frasier's inability to lie

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordon's disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Mariam and Nasser, from the West Midlands, find a family holiday home they can eventually retire to in the countryside of Murcia, south-east Spain. The couple used to live near Madrid and desperately miss the Spanish sunshine and way of life, especially the outdoor cooking. Laura has five sizzling hot properties to show them for their £70,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lisa and daughter Jordan are searching for their dream holiday home around the beautiful inland villages of Andalucía. They particularly love the town of Velez-Malaga, so Jonnie Irwin lines up five properties in the area for their budget of £75,000. They have set their sights on a traditional Spanish property with a modern twist, so will Jonnie be able to deliver?

programme.title: Mend It for Money
programme.desc: Antiques dealer Mantas brings in a vintage horse-drawn sleigh from Lithuania, and later, nurse Loretta looks for a woodworker to breathe new life into her vintage trunk

programme.title: Jamie and Jimmy's Friday Night Feast
programme.desc: Presenters Ant and Dec join Jamie Oliver and Jimmy Doherty in their cafe on Southend Pier. The Saturday Night Takeaway hosts love sushi, so Jamie and Jimmy help get them ready to rumble with a beginner's guide to Japanese cooking. Away from the bistro, Jamie rustles up a mouth-watering Italian-style steak and chips, while Jimmy demonstrates a simple crispy chicken that looks impressive without taking hours. Out on the road, Jamie and Jimmy train as baristas at a coffee company that helps homeless people get back on their feet

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: It's Music Week in the pottery, as the remaining potters sculpt a life-like bust of a music legend, kick starting with a surprise special message from an iconic artist. The potters then face a fiddly second challenge to make a mini musical instrument, before judges Rich Miller and Keith Brymer Jones decide who will be named potter of the week and who will be heading home. Siobhan McSweeney hosts

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Two singletons in the wedding industry hope to find love for themselves on Valentine's Day, and a 71-year-old retired politician looks for someone to go travelling with. A West End actor may get over his romantic stage fright with the help of a musical theatre fan, while a delivery driver may finally have found a woman who is not driven off by his jokes

programme.title: Extraordinary Escapes with Sandi Toksvig
programme.desc: The presenter explores the UK's wildest, most remote and beautifully designed holiday homes, accompanied by some of the nation's most fascinating and funny women. From a lighthouse cottage on a private island near the Isle of Skye and a stunning tree house in the Wye Valley, to the only nature reserve in England in which you can stay, every episode visits a different region and promises hidden away places offering glorious sanctuary. In the opening edition, Sandi is joined by legendary actor Alison Steadman to seek out extraordinary escapes in the wilds of Suffolk

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: In the small fishing village of Polperro in southern Cornwall, harbourmaster Olly Puckey prepares for the arrival of a new storm gate, designed to protect residents, houses and fishing boats from the winter sea surges. In Devon, dairy farmer Jon Perkin hopes visitors at Widdecombe Fair are willing to try his alternative ice-cream and yoghurt, while stonemason Alex Piper and glazier Arthur Bradley must draw on all their skills and experience to save the crumbling vestry window of a church in the Cornish village of Warbstow

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Phil Spencer returns to Brixworth in Northamptonshire to catch up with Sarah and Ian who appeared on the show back in 2015. Back then, they had just one toddler and two dogs and their two-bed semi was bursting at the seams. Ian wanted to move on, but Sarah was determined to stay, convinced their home had the potential to cater for a growing family. Now, Phil returns to find out what happened next

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George looks back at arguably his most ambitious project, when he and Will Hardie built a 360-degree, gravity-defying, rotating home inspired by vintage sci-fi comics. In search of inspiration for this seemingly impossible challenge, George goes to Holland, Germany and the local fairground

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick treats a Labrador puppy with an elbow disease, and believes a possible solution might involve fitted plates and stem cell injections. Elsewhere, a one-year-old cat is brought in suffering from a crushed pelvis and a broken tail after a road traffic accident, and a Russian Black Terrier with a cancerous growth is at risk of losing his leg

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The Wheatsheaf in Sandbach, Cheshire, where owner Jake Pare and general manager Chris Baldwin hope to impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay of the week is at the Shawries Hotel in Blackpool, where the dated decor takes two guests back to their childhood and breakfast is a build-your-own sandwich platter

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A microbrewery on the Spanish coast bags a valuable new client, while in France, B&B owners work hard to complete work on their breakfast terrace

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson helps Sarah and Adam from Sussex search for a holiday home in the coastal town of Mojacar, Spain, with a budget of £85,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: With their children now leading independent lives, Kevin and Monique Dixon want to buy a holiday home on Florida's Gulf Coast, where they can enjoy the sailing and outdoor life as the UK winters begin back home. With £285,000 to spend, presenter Ben Hillman shows them five waterside homes

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the Manchester area, 27-year-old full-time mum Johanna, plans an evening dedicated to takeways from Turkey to China and India. Her guests are 34-year-old lorry driver Ryan, 48-year-old housewife Fiona, 45-year-old laundrette owner Linzi and 53-year-old translator Nico, on a night that includes a sojourn into Shakespeare

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Manchester, lorry-driving movie buff Ryan plans a film-inspired menu including his 'Prawn Identity' starter, 'Sausage Meat the Fockers' and 'Chocolate Clockwork Orange' desert. Unfortunately the first course is more of a disaster movie for Johanna, who has to face her fear of prawns. Meanwhile, Nico puts the cat among the pigeons with his views on male chefs and Fiona takes Linzi to task over her beauty regime

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Glamorous 'domestic delegator' Fiona aims to impress with a classy but effortless menu as she hosts the third dinner party of the week in the Manchester area. However, critical Linzi takes issue with Fiona's mother chopping her vegetables and her cousin making her honeycomb. Then, there's more trouble brewing as Nico and Johanna clash

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Critical laundrette owner Linzi has been a hard taskmaster all week in the Manchester area, so expects to show her guests where they've been going wrong. She's not pleased when Ryan questions her choice of starter. When the guests find out what Linzi does for a job, Nico struggles to understand the concept of a laundrette. Self-proclaimed domestic delegator Fiona has to face her fears during Linzi's entertainment - an ironing competition

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in the Manchester area, Nico plans to show the Brits how it's done in the kitchen with his Italian cooking. He's been talking up his Italian heritage all week, and Linzi's convinced he's heading for a fall. Ryan's shocked by some of Nico's locker-room tales, while baby of the group Johanna horrifies the other female contestants with her thoughts on gender politics. It remains to be seen who will pick up the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles plans a holiday at his newly acquired cabin to get over the shock of Daphne's blossoming romance with Donny, and later joins forces with a lovelorn Roz to end the couple's relationship. Comedy, with David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Crane brothers plan a dinner party, but agonise over who to invite, and devise an unusual game to determine the final guest list. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Yanni's in Seattle, where he clashes with defiant owner Peter Avgoustiou, a chef so set in his ways that he hasn't allowed any changes to his menu since the Greek restaurant opened in 1984. Peter's family is concerned the business is becoming trapped in the past, and standards are slipping, but he seems determined to stick to his guns

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Following a recent health scare, beauty consultant Marcelle and coach company owner Graeme are seizing the moment and about to buy a holiday home in western Malaga for stress-free holidays together. They'd love to find an apartment near the town of Benalmádena with a communal pool and private outdoor space and have given Jasmine Harman a budget of £120,000 to find the perfect property

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas is house hunting along the south-east coast of Cyprus with mother and daughter Pat and Tash from Reading, Berkshire. Pat has been longing to buy a holiday home for 20 years, but has always been too busy working and caring for her family to turn the dream into a reality. Now she's retired, she's finally seizing the moment, and is poised to consider the five options Scarlette has found for her within her £70,000 budget

programme.title: Mend It for Money
programme.desc: Expert restorers pitch for the chance to work on a church pew that used to grace a pub, a vintage draughting table discovered in an attic and a handmade copper bucket

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: In the small fishing village of Polperro in southern Cornwall, harbourmaster Olly Puckey prepares for the arrival of a new storm gate, designed to protect residents, houses and fishing boats from the winter sea surges. In Devon, dairy farmer Jon Perkin hopes visitors at Widdecombe Fair are willing to try his alternative ice-cream and yoghurt, while stonemason Alex Piper and glazier Arthur Bradley must draw on all their skills and experience to save the crumbling vestry window of a church in the Cornish village of Warbstow

programme.title: Undercover Police: Hunting Paedophiles
programme.desc: Documentary following officers as they assume new identities online and are given the task of engaging with people who have demonstrated a sexual interest in children. In the first edition, an undercover officer pretends to be a 47-year-old paedophile, claiming he enjoys sexually abusing his 10-year-old daughter and is looking for other men who would like to join him

programme.title: Secret Safari: Into the Wild
programme.desc: The youngest of the conservancy's eight ostriches prepares for mating, and the rangers hope this will lead to increased numbers for their dwindling flock of the birds. A lioness searches for her three cubs, which have gone missing following a buffalo attack, and a one-armed baboon attempts to ingratiate himself with a new troop after being rejected by his own

programme.title: Catching a Killer
programme.desc: Cameras follow Thames Valley Police's investigation into the murder of 64-year-old Hang Yin Leung, who died after being violently assaulted during a burglary at her Milton Keynes home in January 2017. Filmed over 12 months, the programme interweaves the police's enquiries with an intimate portrait of a British-Chinese family coming to terms with the impact of murder, with the story of migrants from Hong Kong who came to the UK in search of a better life for their son unfolding alongside the hunt for the killers

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Mo Gilligan and Babatunde Aleshe are among the famous faces hitting the couch, joining Britain's favourite opinionated viewers as part of this year's Stand Up to Cancer appeal. Also taking part are Line of Duty's Adrian Dunbar, Vicky McClure and Martin Compston, KSI and Craig David, David Mitchell and Victoria Coren Mitchell, and Roger Daltrey and John Bishop. Shows they are appraising include Simply Nigella, Five Guys a Week, The Andrew Marr Show interview with Michael Gove, Family Fortunes, Scream, The Million Pound Cube, Emily's Story: Stand Up to Cancer, and news coverage of Manchester mayor Andy Burnham's skirmish with the Government

programme.title: Mend It for Money
programme.desc: A combination of Money for Nothing and The Repair Shop, in which people bring in their old items to be brought back to life. But there's a twist. The experts pitch for the chance to complete the job - then take a share of any profit when the restored relic is sold. Today's items are an unusual paraffin stove, a set of dilapidated farmhouse drawers and a battered travel chest

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer guide prospective buyers in Hampshire through the complex world of viewings and agents as they try to buy a home. Kirstie meets Clive and Debbie, a couple who are looking to find a home with enough bedrooms for their extended family and a garden big enough for their outdoor-loving children to enjoy. Meanwhile, Phil meets chemical engineers TJ and Chee, who moved from Malaysia to the UK to ignite their careers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay of the week is at the Shawries Hotel in Blackpool, where the dated decor takes two guests back to their childhood and breakfast is a build-your-own sandwich platter

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. East Walls Hotel is first up, and owners Celia and Damon need to clean up Dave's toilet brush troubles before broaching his beef with the breakfast banger

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A drive for new custom pays off for a microbrewery in Spain, a weaving business launches in Portugal and a couple in Andalucia aim to make money from their love of crafting

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Mariam and Nasser, from the West Midlands, find a family holiday home they can eventually retire to in the countryside of Murcia, south-east Spain. programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun

They fell in love with Costa Rica when they visited it on holiday and have decided to buy a holiday home on its Pacific Coast, so Ben Hillman shows the duo five properties in the region within their £300,000 budget

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In north Surrey, planning enforcement officer Becky is joined by singing teacher Petrina, drum teacher Rob, solicitor Shoba and building company boss Giovanni. Becky plans to delight her guests with an evening of modern home-cooking and a menu including butternut, lamb and a deconstructed apple dessert. The week gets off to an intriguing start with young gun Rob taking a shine to Petrina and vice versa

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Solicitor Shoba hosts the second night in north Surrey, and tries to impress with an Indian-themed menu. However, the guests are less than impressed with the food, especially the main course - a curry made from frozen fish - but will a bit of belly dancing, Bollywood-style, help save the day? Meanwhile, singer Petrina and drummer Rob continue their flirting both at and away from the table

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Drum tutor Rob hosts the third night in north Surrey, hoping his Thai-themed menu will impress his guests, as well as the object of his affections, Petrina. He serves prawns with lemon, lime and chilli for his starter, Thai chicken curry for his main, and rounds off with his own take on an ice-cream sundae. As a single man living in his stepmother's house, Rob thinks his competitors will see him as an underdog, so is intent on pulling out all the stops

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Singing teacher Petrina hosts the fourth dinner party in north Surrey, and she believes her experience of entertaining on cruise ships will give her the edge as she plans a showstopper of an evening. However, the diners seem more interested in their host's continued flirting with fellow guest Rob. Will tonight be the night, or will he shy away when he discovers Petrina has sung in the West End and worked with dozens of household names?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Giovanni hosts the final night of the competition in north Surrey, intent on flying the flag for Sicily with some family inspired recipes. Even with help from his father, a tagliatelle tragedy leaves him with Parmesan on his face. Becky is less than impressed with Giovanni's dishes, and matters go from bad to worse when he attempts to serve his home-made pasta. However, poor food doesn't deter a romantic Rob from popping the question to Petrina, sending shockwaves across the dining room. In a final attempt to bag the £1,000, Giovanni invites an opera singer to liven up the proceedings, but his musical initiative may prove too little to save the day

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles tries to reclaim his luxury apartment but finds obstacles in his path, including a tap-dancing grief counsellor and wary neighbours. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Feuding brothers Niles and Frasier decide to find out once and for all which of them has the higher IQ. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he meets husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who reveal a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faces the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company, but can he get through to this defiant pair?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies is on Spain's Costa Blanca house-hunting around the vibrant resort of Villamartin with Amanda and Steve, who want to buy a holiday home where they can spend the winter months golfing, socialising and soaking up the sun. Danni has been given a budget of £85,000, with which she finds five properties that she thinks fits the bill. Will Amanda and Steve love one of them sufficiently to buy it?

programme.desc: Gordon and the team revamp a traditional southern food restaurant located in Richmond, Virginia. It is owned by Shane and her two daughters Chelsea and Kelyn, who have poured all their money into it - and are now in debt and trying to avoid bankruptcy

programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Featuring a single mum and her daughter who faced problems when they moved into a new flat in Milton Keynes because of a resident in the same block. Plus, the case of a Manchester man and his son whose life in a new flat turned into a nightmare when they were viciously turned upon in the form of a racist attack by one of their neighbours

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary giving an insight into cash-strapped Britain from the perspectives of debtors, creditors and those who collect the payments, including High Court enforcement bailiffs and repossession teams. Paul and Ben are called in to evict squatters from a residential property, but something about the squat does not quite add up for the team

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul and Steve's first job is an eviction with a twist when they find out the landlord is the tenant's son, while their next case is also tricky and involves family members with a question mark over their immigration status who are now facing homelessness. Their final case involves a man with a history of mental illness who has reached the end of his tenancy but refuses to leave, and Steve tries to find a solution after a church minister and his mother fail to placate him

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary series giving an insight into the world of debt collection. Kevin Stokes and Brian O'Shaughnessy try to collect a debt from a technology company, but with the director nowhere to be seen, the office manager does everything she can to prove the business is no longer trading. Stewart McCracken and Elmor Victor face a heartbreaking house repossession in Merseyside, where two landlords are forced to evict a tenant recovering from a brain tumour which has cost him his job and income

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Kevin Stokes and Brian O'Shaughnessy get into a doorstep confrontation with a debtor who wants to prove her family business is bankrupt. programme.desc: Between 1975 and 1980, serial killer Peter Sutcliffe - known in the press as the Yorkshire Ripper - murdered 13 women and attacked at least seven more in the north of England. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A traffic collision that resulted in multiple fatalities is seemingly caused by a drink driver, but that theory is dismissed as Lupo and Bernard's investigation gets under way. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Ross investigate when a restaurant becomes the scene of a shooting, and discover one of the diners is concealing a desire for revenge. Unfortunately, the object of their suspicion has a clever defence already up her sleeve - and only an expert witness can break her story. Sam Waterston and Carey Lowell star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A charity worker with a secret appetite for sordid encounters dies at the hands of a serial killer, but the defendant constructs a unique case by claiming the crime was the result of exposure to excessive violence on television. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Carey Lowell

programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the death of an environmental scientist who was poisoned at a global-warming convention. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the death of an heiress from an apparent drug overdose. However, the duo soon realise there is more to the case than meets the eye, as they uncover a conspiracy to kill off wealthy cancer patients so inheritors do not have to pay an estate tax

programme.desc: The shooting of a petty officer looks like an open-and-shut case when a Russian man is found with a recently fired gun in his car. Military crime drama, with Mark Harmon, Cote de Pablo and David McCallum

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a lance corporal, whose body has been found in an empty house, and discovers he had a number of spurned lovers and a $2million inheritance. Ducky and Gibbs interview one of the dead marine's partners, but disagree over whether she is telling the truth. David McCallum and Mark Harmon star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Kidnappers strike on Halloween, wounding a marine sergeant and snatching his daughter - leaving the team members wondering why anyone would try to extort money from someone on such a modest salary. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis trace a robbery suspect to a militia group, but McCoy is strangely affected by the leader's devotion to his cause - and begins to receive death threats once the case comes to court. Award-winning police drama, starring Benjamin Bratt and Jerry Orbach

programme.desc: A key witness in a murder trial is found dead outside her hotel room, and Lupo and Bernard's investigation embroils them in a conspiracy involving black-market dealings, drug cartels and corrupt officials. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An elderly man is declared a neighbourhood hero after he shoots three people in an armed raid on his store. Elliott Gould guest stars, with Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate when a male nurse is found beaten to within an inch of his life - but as they draw closer to their prime suspects, the shocking motives for the attack become clear. Gritty police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill

programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis come up against the Mob when a Mafia gangster-turned-FBI witness is found dead, and the investigation is hampered when the only lead fails to leave any evidence. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A young boy is abandoned in Times Square, and leads the detectives to the house where his family lives. Inside they find a locked basement where more victims await rescue, and the team works to solve a litany of decades-old cases. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A failed jewellery store robbery results in a murder that results in three coins being retrieved from a dead thief's stomach. It seems that the coins have an unsettling effect on whoever possesses them, and Hank and Captain Renard soon begin to exhibit unusual behaviour. Elsewhere, an old friend of Aunt Marie's comes to Nick with information about the circumstances of his parents' death. Fantasy drama, starring Russell Hornsby

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick searches for a dragon-like monster that has killed two men in a warehouse with its fiery breath, but finds himself having to fend off the seductive advances of the creature's manipulative daughter. Fantasy drama, starring Russell Hornsby, with Danielle Panabaker

programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. programme.title: Law & Order

Award-winning police drama, guest starring Richard Belzer and Jon Seda, with Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The parents of a baby given up for adoption could provide a clue to the death of a new mother - but the investigation also turns up long-buried family secrets. The detectives are forced to consider the possibility that racial prejudice played a part in the case

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives Lupo and Bernard investigate when a community activist is murdered. Meanwhile, Van Buren gets bad news from former detective Ray Curtis. Police drama, starring Jeremy Sisto, Anthony Anderson and S Epatha Merkerson

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The investigation into a freelance journalist's murder leads detectives Lupo and Bernard to uncover a connection between the victim and a talk-show host. Crime drama, starring Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The fatal stabbing of a psychologist draws Briscoe and Curtis into a heated divorce case and pits McCoy and Ross against a manipulative attorney who puts results before professional ethics. Award-winning American police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate when a student is shot dead after a party gets out of control. The victim's boyfriend is arrested, but the officers later receive a tip-off about someone else - a vengeful youth deliberately infecting girls with HIV. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Last-ever episode of the long-running crime drama. When Van Buren discovers a website featuring footage of an alarming amount of explosives, Lupo and Bernard race to find the anonymous blogger who filmed it before his plans to bomb a school are put into action. However, the Department of Education's refusal to take the threat seriously and resistance from the teachers' union complicate the investigation

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A worker at a meat-packing plant is killed in the workplace, prompting Logan and Briscoe to turn their attention to the man's disgruntled Russian bride. The pair learn the foreign widow married in the hope of a better life, but fell in love with a co-worker - and out of favour with her husband

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Two FBI agents try to seize control of the team's investigation into the discovery of a perfectly preserved body hidden in a chimney at a marine base. Reluctant to be ousted from the case, Gibbs agrees to work with them - and learns the victim was a serial killer responsible for the deaths of 14 people. Meanwhile, McGee's literary efforts lead to discord with the others

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team tries to find out who was responsible for sabotaging a robotic vehicle that caused the death of a Navy lieutenant and almost killed Abby. Meanwhile, Ziva's suspicions are aroused by the discovery that Tony is repeatedly visiting the hospital. Drama, starring Pauley Perrette, Michael Weatherly, Cote de Pablo and Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The discovery of a dead marine intelligence officer in a motel room sets the team off on a hunt for her killer. Although the town's authorities have allegedly already investigated the crime, Gibbs is determined to conduct his own thorough inquiries - which may lead him to a terrorist cell. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Rollins and Benson investigate the rape of an underage girl, who initially refuses to co-operate or press charges against a trio of suspects, but eventually comes clean and leads the detectives to the strip club where she works - although her boss denies any wrongdoing and rejects a request for his client list. Starring Mariska Hargitay and Kelli Giddish

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team responds to the reported kidnapping of a 16-year-old girl at a party - and her disappearance could be linked with her boyfriend's gang associations. Elsewhere, Benson has a ceremony to decree her becoming the new SVU sergeant. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team members search for a missing diabetic child who also suffers from an attachment disorder. A shocking confession from the youngster's mother leads them to a couple of known sex offenders, and the detectives face a race against time to find the kid before he falls into a coma. Meanwhile, Benson is preoccupied by a pregnancy scare. Guest starring Rosanna Arquette

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Controversy grips New York when a black teenager is shot by a white celebrity chef, who claims she was defending herself against the city's serial rapist - an assumption that proved incorrect. Assistant District Attorney Barba faces a tough battle against a shrewd defence lawyer as he seeks justice for the victim and his family

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An officer accuses his former colleagues from the 12th Precinct of fraud and cover-ups, but it results in him being committed to a psychiatric ward. The Internal Affairs Bureau asks members of the SVU to assist their investigation, and Cassidy is sent in undercover - but his life is threatened when someone in the crooked team is prepared to stop at nothing to keep things the way they are

programme.title: Grimm

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Sitcom written by My Family creator Fred Barron, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst of only Only Fools and Horses fame as divorcee Jimmy Venables, whose ex-wife leaves to work as a nurse in Africa. He soon finds his efforts to raise his children - Molly, a girl who thinks she's a woman, and Alex, a boy who dresses like one - hindered by mother-in-law Diana, who takes it on herself to move in to the family home. Also in the cast are Celia Imrie and Dani Harmer

programme.title: Danger UXB

programme.title: Deadlier than the Male (1966)
programme.desc: Private eye Bulldog Drummond grows suspicious of an industrialist who involves himself in immensely lucrative business deals. Drama, starring Richard Johnson, Elke Sommer, Sylvia Koscina, Nigel Green and Suzanna Leigh

programme.title: Forty Thousand Horsemen (1941)
programme.desc: Three Australian volunteers take part in the last cavalry charge in modern warfare while serving in Palestine. First World War drama, starring Grant Taylor and Betty Bryant

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Sitcom written by My Family creator Fred Barron, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst of only Only Fools and Horses fame as divorcee Jimmy Venables, whose ex-wife leaves to work as a nurse in Africa. programme.title: No Bass Like Home
programme.desc: Highlights from Brent 2020's No Bass Like Home Festival celebrating reggae culture. Featuring live music sets and the musical, cultural and social history of reggae in and around Harlesden

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: Regular guest Alexander, Crown Prince of Yugoslavia, returns to stay in the suite in which he was born in 1945. There are also visits by actress Joan Collins, writer and comedian Stephen Fry and the Emperor of Japan, as well as 85-year-old former bookmaker Gerry Parker, who has breakfasted at Claridge's for the past 40 years. General manager Thomas Kochs takes any change very seriously and oversees every decision necessary - from new alarm clocks to a £10million renovation plan

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Graveyard
programme.desc: In central London archaeologists made an extraordinary discovery, a lost graveyard from the 17th Century. Offering a rare glimpse into the lives of a generation at the beginning of the modern world

programme.title: The Comic Strip Presents
programme.desc: Satirical comedy, starring Adrian Edmonson as Eddie Monsoon, a TV entertainer who following the failure of several pilot shows in his native South Africa faked his suicide and went to Brazil. He eventually arrives in England where he attracts notoriety with his explicit stage and media work, and later, while undergoing treatment of drug and alcohol addiction, agrees to sell an interview about his life and career

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Michael tries to get Joe Pesci to star in his proposed new film Bongo in the Congo, but receives an unenthusiastic response. The lives, loves and laundry of the famous stars living in leafy Surbiton, as performed by impressionists John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: National Treasure
programme.desc: Paul and his family head for court to face the accusers and await the verdict. Paul has his own ideas about how to proceed, and in defiance of Jerome's recommendations, is determined to take the witness stand himself and give his side of the story. However, it seems that Karl may hold the key to determining the outcome of the trial. Dee starts to suspect that Marie's faith in her husband's innocence may be wavering and that even if he is innocent, their marriage may not survive. Robbie Coltrane and Julie Walters star in the final episode of the drama

programme.title: Long Weekend (1978)
programme.desc: A couple take a camping holiday at a remote beach to try and rebuild their struggling relationship. Their disrespect for the wildlife and the environment provokes the wrath of a supernatural presence, and the torment they endure from it brings tensions between them to the surface. Horror, starring John Hargreaves and Briony Behets

programme.title: Absolution (1978)
programme.desc: A humourless priest in a Catholic boys' school falls victim to a practical joke played by his favourite student - with tragic consequences for all concerned. Drama, starring Richard Burton, Dominic Guard, Billy Connolly, Sharon Duce and Andrew Keir

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Laura buys a new dress for a special dinner with Ben. However, when her date reveals he is married, Mike happens by to pick up the pieces with his usual charm. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams as middle-aged romantics

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: The landmark series from the 1970s takes a look at the origins of jazz and challenges the theories that it is a black music form which was created in New Orleans. Featuring contributions and footage from Miles Davis, Duke Ellington, Charlie Mingus and Louis Armstrong

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Graveyard
programme.desc: In central London archaeologists made an extraordinary discovery, a lost graveyard from the 17th Century. Offering a rare glimpse into the lives of a generation at the beginning of the modern world

programme.title: Time Without Pity (1957)
programme.desc: An alcoholic writer returns home after years living abroad when he learns his estranged son has been convicted of murder and sentenced to hang. Although his attempts at reconciliation are rejected, he spends the last 24 hours before the execution trying to prove his son is innocent by identifying the real killer. Mystery, starring Michael Redgrave, Ann Todd, Leo McKern and Peter Cushing

programme.title: The Kid From Canada (1958)
programme.desc: A boy visits his family in the Scottish Highlands, where his boastfulness gets him into trouble during a horse riding trip. Family drama, with Christopher Braden and Bernard Braden

programme.title: Where Angels Fear to Tread (1991)
programme.desc: A wealthy widow travels to Italy to escape the pressure of her in-laws, and promptly falls in love with a poor local. When the revived woman agrees to marry her foreign friend, her relatives back home are shocked by the apparent disregard for class, culture and their family's image, and set about putting an end to the unlikely union. Period drama, based on the novel by EM Forster, starring Helena Bonham Carter, Judy Davis and Rupert Graves

programme.title: The Wind of Change (1961)
programme.desc: An unemployed teenager in Notting Hill grows increasingly frustrated with his life, his anger manifesting as a deep-seated racism. When he and his friends commit a brutal act of violence on a black man and his white girlfriend, the attack has devastating repercussions for his family. Drama, starring Donald Pleasence and Johnny Briggs

programme.title: The Bionic Vet
programme.desc: Noel Fitzpatrick prepares to amputate a corgi's cancerous paw and replace it with a prosthetic foot, a procedure that has only been carried out on two other dogs. He also catches up with a puppy that was suffering from a painful bone deformity, and treats a barn owl brought into the surgery with a broken wing

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: The Old Guys
programme.desc: Tom discovers he would qualify for a lump sum from his pension if he were married, so tries to strike up a deal with Sally. Meanwhile, Amber decides to impress her new boss by taking up cycling and, much to Tom's annoyance, receives tuition from Roy on how to ride a bike. Comedy, starring Clive Swift, Roger Lloyd Pack and Jane Asher

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Mick decides to dedicate his life to religion, while Joe receives decorating advice from Roger Moore. Comedy, written and performed by John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: Red Army Hooligans (2018)
programme.desc: The leader of a hooligan gang sustains a head injury in a fight with a Russian rival, that could bring an end to his life of violence. However, when both factions find themselves banned from the world cup, he challenges the Russians to come to London and face him and his followers in a series of street battles. Crime thriller, starring Jon-Paul Gates and Earl Ling

programme.title: Mad Dog Morgan (1976)
programme.desc: An Irishman seeking his fortune in the Australian Gold Rush ends up in prison when driven to robbery out of desperation. After 12 years of abuse, he is released and becomes an outlaw, determined to make society pay for his suffering - and becoming a hero to the downtrodden in the process. Fact-based Western, starring Dennis Hopper and Jack Thompson

programme.title: Cruel Passion (1977)
programme.desc: Two sisters are expelled from a nunnery and are plunged into a life of debauchery. While one embraces her new lifestyle, the other is desperate to cling to her old morality and sees a hope of salvation in a mysterious aristocrat who harbours a hidden dark side. Historical drama based on the novel Justine by the Marquis de Sade, starring Koo Stark and Martin Potter

programme.title: Val and Elsie
programme.desc: Short film about a pensioner and her reckless carer

programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War thriller following the exploits of a squadron of British officers who head into Nazi-occupied Crete to kidnap a German general from under his comrades' noses, but struggle to transport their prisoner back to Cairo unnoticed. Starring Dirk Bogarde, Marius Goring and Cyril Cusack. Directed by frequent collaborators Michael Powell and Emeric Pressburger

programme.title: The Only Way (1970)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama, set in occupied Denmark and telling the story of a heroic effort to smuggle 7,000 Jews over the border into Sweden so they might escape the Holocaust. Starring Ove Sprogoe and Jane Seymour

programme.desc: A couple's life is disrupted by a penniless woman who arrives for the weekend, setting in motion a disastrous sequence of events. Drama, starring Judi Dench, whose performance won her a Bafta award, and James Wilby

programme.desc: St Mirren v Celtic (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage of the Scottish top-flight clash from Simple Digital Arena, as Neil Lennon's side look for three points in their quest to chase down Rangers in the title race. programme.desc: The AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am. Further coverage of the opening day from Pebble Beach Links in California, as Canadian Nick Taylor looks to defend his title that he won last year. The victory was his first since his only previous PGA victory at the 2014 Sanderson Farms Championship.
